property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.11-bin\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;%JAVA_HOME%\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.17.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Users\USER\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.11-bin.zip\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Yarn\bin\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\USER\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.11-bin.zip\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Users\USER\Downloads\maven-mvnd-1.0.3-windows-amd64\maven-mvnd-1.0.3-windows-amd64\bin;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.11-bin\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.4\bin;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Local\Yarn\bin;C:\Users\USER\AppData\Roaming\npm;.
